model.chat.reason: adapter exposes agent turns rather than direct model calls

model.streaming.reason: model deltas may be reconstructed from coarse progress events

model.reasoning.output.reason: adapter does not expose raw reasoning events

model.tool_calling.reason: tool calls may be visible only as agent progress

action.tools.list.reason: adapter does not expose a normalized tool catalog

action.tools.execute.reason: tool execution is mediated by the remote runtime

action.tools.progress.reason: progress is mapped from coarse runtime notifications when available

action.tool_sources.attach.reason: tool-source attachment must happen inside the adapted runtime

action.permissions.reason: permission prompts are mapped to the adapted runtime's request/response flow

agent.sessions.list.reason: adapter can list sessions only when the adapted runtime exposes them

agent.transcript.load.reason: adapter may reconstruct transcript history from persisted session state

agent.run.streaming.reason: stream shape follows the adapted runtime's progress model

agent.run.instructions.reason: adapter may only prepend instructions to user input rather than replacing runtime instructions

agent.run.tool_selection.reason: adapted runtime does not expose per-run tool selection

agent.run.cancel.reason: cancel maps to cooperative cancellation when supported

agent.run.interrupt.reason: interrupt maps to cooperative cancellation or a stop request when supported

agent.run.resume.reason: adapter cannot guarantee resumable run state

agent.checkpoints.reason: adapter does not expose checkpoint identity

control.models.list.reason: model catalog may be inferred from the adapted runtime

control.auth.providers.reason: auth is owned by the adapted runtime

degradation.reason: adapter does not expose raw or summarized reasoning
adapter cannot always distinguish tool progress from general agent progress
resume state is not available across the adapter boundary
